$comment_status: INDICATIVE bands — Pakistan-realistic 2026 estimates from public benchmarks. Replace with current Izhar Foster pricing before public launch. ±20% band applied to every output. Users can edit any value inline; values persist via localStorage.izhar_cost_overrides.
$source_notes: Tariffs: LESCO + K-Electric + IESCO + MEPCO commercial rates 2025-26 published schedules, weighted-average for B-3 industrial connection
Diesel: OGRA HSD ex-depot 2026 average, adjusted for retail markup
Civil: regional cold-store benchmarks (Pakistan EPC quotes 2024-25), Punjab and Sindh
PIR panel: Izhar Foster historic order book 2023-25 (sales team reference) ±20%
Refrigeration HP: weighted CDU vs ammonia plant capex from Bitzer + Heatcraft + Zanotti packages installed in PK 2023-25
Solar capex: NEPRA-approved IPP rates 2025 for industrial rooftop
Door cost: insulated cold-store door supplier quotations 2024-25, Pakistan delivered
All values in PKR unless otherwise noted. ±20% band applied at output.

panel_pkr_per_m2.$comment: FireSafe PIR sandwich panel + installation. Includes both faces (steel + steel) and PIR core. Excludes structural support. m² = wall + ceiling area combined.

civil_pkr_per_m2.$comment: Pakistan civil works for cold-store envelope: foundation, floor slab + insulation + sealing, drainage, dock approach. m² = footprint area.

envelope_choice_uplift.$comment: Capex delta if customer chooses RCC envelope vs PEB (steel-frame pre-engineered building). RCC is heavier in capex but longer life and better thermal mass. PEB is cheaper and faster.

refrigeration_pkr_per_HP.$comment: Refrigeration plant supply + installation cost per nominal HP. CDU = single condensing unit (small/medium). Rack = multi-compressor parallel for retail/3PL. NH3-glycol = ammonia primary with glycol indirect for safety. NH3-DX = direct expansion ammonia (largest plants).

door_pkr.$comment: Insulated cold-store doors, supply + install. Sliding for cold rooms, hinged for small rooms, high-speed for high-traffic dock. Sized for typical openings.

controls_pkr.$comment: Refrigeration controls, monitoring, BMS / SCADA per zone or per single-room job.

electrical_pkr_per_kw_load.$comment: Electrical scope: panels, cabling, distribution. Indicative per kW of refrigeration plant load (rule of thumb 1.4× for total connected load incl. fans, lights).

city_tariff_pkr_per_kwh.$comment: Industrial commercial tariff (B-3) for off-peak weighted with peak. 2025-26 schedules. Includes fuel adjustment surcharge running average.

diesel.$comment: Diesel for backup generator running through load-shed hours. Generator efficiency assumes a modern 3-phase Cummins/Perkins genset.

solar.$comment: Industrial rooftop solar PV (gridtie + battery option) capex per kW installed. NEPRA-approved 2025 IPP rates for net-metered industrial. Battery uplift if going off-grid.

load_shedding.$comment: Default load-shed hours per day for industrial connections in Pakistan 2025-26. Used to estimate diesel-vs-solar economics. User can override per-city.

engineering_install_pct.$comment: Project execution multipliers applied to direct cost (envelope + refrigeration + doors + civil + electrical + controls). Margin is broken OUT separately below.

margin_pct.$comment: Izhar Foster margin applied AFTER direct cost + EPC uplift. Editable per quote in the UI. Internal tool: sales engineer can shift this slider to compare scenarios. Default 18% (typical mid-band for industrial cold-chain projects in Pakistan).

site_class_civil_factor.$comment: Multiplier on civil cost depending on site readiness and complexity.

commodity_density_kg_per_m3.$comment: Useful storage density (excludes air gaps, racking, aisles). Multiplied by ~0.55 utilisation factor to convert m³ to net stored tons.

pallet_position_factor.$comment: Convert m³ to pallet positions (Euro pallet 1.2x0.8m × 1.6m typical stack height = ~1.5 m³/pallet × 0.6 utilisation in cold store).
